description: A guest calls the front desk late at night to complain about a noisy party in the room next door.

nodes.task_description: Apologize to the complaining guest and assure them the issue will be handled.
Dispatch a security officer to the noisy room to issue a warning.

expected_outcome.value: Security is sent to address the complaint.

nodes.task_description: Log the complaint in the system, tied to both guest rooms.
Follow up with the complaining guest 15 minutes later to ensure the noise has subsided.

expected_outcome.value: The agent follows up to confirm resolution.
